channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iranian attacks amount to violation of sovereignty, Gulf states tell UN
item.description: GCC states, UN rights chief Volker Turk warn of grave repercussions amid war on Iran.

item.title: Trump’s war on Iran, in his own words
item.description: Here’s a look at Trump’s war, in his own words.

item.title: Asian Champions League quarterfinal sends Iran’s Tractor FC to Saudi Arabia
item.description: Draw for AFC Asian Champions League Elite quarterfinals sees Tractor FC play Dubai's Shabab Al-Ahli in Saudi Arabia.

item.title: US-Iran mediation: What are each side’s demands – and is a deal possible?
item.description: Trump's envoys have sent a 15-point ceasefire plan to Iran via Pakistan. But Tehran has its own conditions.

item.title: Large Polymarket, Wall Street bets on Trump’s war news under scrutiny
item.description: Well-timed trades regarding Iran war news this week lead critics to argue White House may be engaged in insider trading.

item.title: Spain’s PM says Israel to inflict on Lebanon same destruction as in Gaza
item.description: Pedro ​Sanchez has been one of the few leaders in Europe to condemn Israel's war in Lebanon, US-Israeli ⁠war on Iran.

item.title: UN human rights chief warns war on Iran is spreading
item.description: UN human rights chief Volker Turk says the war on Iran is spreading across the region, with civilians bearing the brunt.

item.title: Iran’s closure of the Strait of Hormuz is an international crisis
item.description: As such, it requires urgent action.

item.title: ‘A heinous crime’: Air strikes kill seven fighters in Iraq’s Anbar
item.description: Police source tells Al Jazeera attack hits positions of the Iran-aligned PMF, which the US has increasingly targeted.

item.title: US Democrats condemn war on Iran as Senate resolution fails
item.description: The latest war powers resolution in the US Senate to end US attacks on Iran has failed in a 47-53 vote.
